site.title: CKM-AMI champion model public calculator
site.headline: XGBoost emerged as the externally selected deployment model for ICU AMI risk estimation.
site.subheadline: HF-aligned CKM-AMI atlas with workflow, screening, six-model comparison, calibration, SHAP context, and clinical translation.
site.summary: The API contract remains stable while the runtime is switched from the old logistic-only demo to the externally selected champion model.

hero.conclusion: The adjusted CKM logistic model remains in the manuscript for odds-ratio reporting, whereas SHAP, Figure 4-6, and the calculator now follow the champion model.

key_findings: The main-text figure system now follows the HF-style order of workflow, screening, discrimination, calibration/DCA, interpretation, and web translation.
XGBoost was selected by external AUROC-first ranking with fixed tie-breaks using Brier, calibration distance, and AUPRC.
The public calculator keeps GET /api/config and POST /api/predict unchanged while replacing the probability engine with the champion model.
The adjusted CKM logistic model stays in the manuscript as the inferential OR table rather than the only deployment model.
